text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a nice day out, Symboli Rudolf and I
return to the academy...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me for asking, but are you busy right
now?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hoped we might speak a little longer. Over
coffee, perhaps?
choice_data_list: Should we head over to my office?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That sounds perfect. Lead the—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez! There you are! I've been looking all over for
you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I pulled off the craziest win yesterday! I've gotta tell you all about it!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Dear me. No rest for the wicked, it seems...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove and Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
President!
Hey, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for springing this on you so suddenly,
but the student council has received a request
from the director—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, you don't! We've got a situation over at the dorms, and I need the Prez's help pronto!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can handle that myself later. The director's
request is far more urgent—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, back off, you two! I had her first!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You just want a chance to brag! This is urgent!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of a sudden, a fight seems about to break out
over Symboli Rudolf's attention.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, what to do?
choice_data_list: Let's take a rain check on that coffee.
Let's take a rain check on that coffee.
Maybe I can help you out?
Maybe I can help you out?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, what to do?
choice_data_list: Let's take a rain check on that coffee.
Let's take a rain check on that coffee.
Maybe I can help you out?
Maybe I can help you out?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It doesn't seem meant to be today, does it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But today will be far from our only chance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, you three, please settle down and wait your
turn. I'll hear you all out in a more appropriate
location.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The others quickly fall in line as Symboli Rudolf
takes charge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Goodbye, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Symboli Rudolf walks away with the rest of the
group in tow, it's hard not to admire the respect
she commands from her peers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No, there's no need. This is all just part of the job
of student council president.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, today will be far from our only chance to
speak more. We'll just have to have our coffee
together some other time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now, you three, please settle down and wait your
turn. I'll hear you all out in a more appropriate
location.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The others quickly fall in line as Symboli Rudolf
takes charge.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Goodbye, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Symboli Rudolf quickly get the other
three in line, I feel like I've caught a glimpse of
her Emperor side.
